title: OAuth2 & OIDC Architectural Flows
description: Design the Authorization Code Flow with PKCE to mitigate vulnerabilities found in the Implicit flow. Implement Token Exchange (RFC 8693) for secure identity propagation across microservices.
objectives: Design the Authorization Code Flow with PKCE to mitigate vulnerabilities found in the Implicit flow.
Implement Token Exchange (RFC 8693) for secure identity propagation across microservices.
